templates.title: Build sim_db from HB model (basic)
templates.description: Minimal setup for model-mnl-hb-mh output with a single 'total' subgroup.
templates.body:
[sim_db_build]
betas_csv     = "point_estimates.csv"
cookbook_json = "cookbook.json"
output        = "model.xlsx"
model_type    = "hb"
resp_id_col   = "resp_id"
subgroup_cols = ["total"]
weight_col    = "weight"

templates.title: Build sim_db from HB model with scenarios
templates.description: Full setup including a scenarios CSV and multiple demographic subgroups.
templates.body:
[sim_db_build]
betas_csv     = "point_estimates.csv"
cookbook_json = "cookbook.json"
scenarios_csv = "scenarios.csv"
output        = "model.xlsx"
model_type    = "hb"
resp_id_col   = "resp_id"
subgroup_cols = ["total", "male", "female", "age_18_34", "age_35_plus"]
weight_col    = "weight"

templates.title: Build sim_db from HB Stan model
templates.description: model-mnl-hb-stan output: no header row, no resp_id column, columns in cookbook order.

templates.title: Build sim_db from LC model
templates.description: model-mnl-lc output: coefficient × segment matrix. Each segment becomes a pseudo-respondent.

templates.title: Build sim_db from LG (logit) model
templates.description: model-mnl-lg aggregate coefficients. A single pseudo-respondent row is created.
